soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The flagship observable program depends on C_n(eta), but the proposal never gives the finite constraint system, dimension, or primitive data map defining this cone.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the informal sensitivity cone C_n(eta) with an explicit finite-dimensional constraint set: variables, matrix blocks, inequalities/equalities, and which entries are observed versus analyst-declared.
Add a small worked design-orbit example computing A_n, N_n(eta), Delta_eta,n, and the point/covariance row split to make the §9 reductions auditable.
Correct the handoff/checklist author name for GaoDing2025Network to Mengsi Gao and keep the verified venue/date metadata aligned with the bibliography.

recommended_next_step: Revise the cone-program definition before Stage 0 so the flagship iff frontier is a genuinely computable observable threshold.
